charter_decision_filter.artifact: Prospectively frozen typed semantic endpoint instrument and mutation-tested validator.
charter_decision_filter.duplication_and_scope: Repairs one invalid cross-family instrument without changing v4 or narrowing benchmark scope.
charter_decision_filter.uncertainty: Whether the v4 procedure conditions can be compared after factual and fair-basis endpoint defects are removed.
charter_decision_filter.useful_completion: Independent derivation, fair basis, checker conformance, condition blindness, parity, zero-attempt, and claim gates all pass before execution.

fork_boundary: Only the defective endpoint instrument is versioned. v4 artifacts and scores remain immutable and are not rescored.
repair_invariants: expected semantics derive from frozen public input and source rules
all required identifiers and JSON types are public
assignment cells and order preserve v4 parity

reused_treatment_materials.controls: Reuse v4 frozen controls by exact manifest binding; do not regenerate or tune treatment content.
